name: PLUMAS BANCORP
summary: Plumas Bancorp is a bank holding company headquartered in Reno, Nevada, operating primarily through its subsidiary Plumas Bank, a California state-chartered bank founded in 1980. The Bank offers commercial real estate loans, SBA loans, agricultural lending, consumer loans, and a wide range of deposit products including checking, money market, savings, and time deposit accounts. It serves individuals, businesses, and municipalities across Northeastern California and Northwestern Nevada through seventeen California branches and two Nevada branches.

products.name: SBA 7(a) Loans
products.description: Government-guaranteed small business loans, both fixed and variable rate, with Preferred Lender status nationwide.

products.name: Agricultural Loans
products.description: Credit services for individual, small, and corporate farming operations across California and Oregon.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by commercial real estate, comprising 66.3% of total loan portfolio as of December 31, 2025.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Includes residential equity lines of credit and automobile loans, comprising 7.3% of total loan portfolio.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Checking, money market, savings, time deposit, retirement, and sweep accounts for commercial and retail customers.

products.name: Internet and Mobile Banking
products.description: Online and mobile banking with bill pay, mobile deposit, remote deposit, and telephone banking capabilities.

partnerships.description: Nationwide Preferred Lender status granted in 2007, enabling faster SBA loan approvals for customers.
